question_text: Which of the following statements about gravitational fields is correct?

options.label: A
options.text: A gravitational field only exists around planets with life on them.

options.label: B
options.text: All objects with mass have a gravitational field around them.

options.label: C
options.text: Gravitational fields push objects away from each other.

options.label: D
options.text: Gravitational fields are only found in space, not on Earth.

explanation: Every object with mass creates a gravitational field that pulls other objects towards it. The bigger and more massive the object, the stronger its gravitational field.
